src/main/java/com/qdc/lims/ui/backup/Bac.general_idea: Add Spring Boot annotation to ensure database initialization completes before the service is used.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/com/qdc/lims/ui/backup/Bac.why_exists: List.get(0) is not deprecated, but List.getFirst() is the preferred API in Java 21 for readability and safety; however, strictly speaking, get(0) still compiles. This is a polishment/modernization change.
